Local-first workspace intelligence

Atlas queries your codebase without sending it away.

Local-first workspace intelligence for developers who need speed, architectural context, and privacy by default.

Download AtlasView on GitHub

Privacy-first RAG

Local storage, local models, and optional cloud routing behind secret shielding.

Temporal context

Follow changes over time with timeline intelligence and Git-aware summaries.

Agentic workflows

Search, review, inspect, and propose edits inside a bounded local surface.

Atlas Desktop

Workspace

Architecture
Timeline
Search
Analytics

Assistant

Architect persona

Atlas mapped this repo into hybrid retrieval, GraphRAG entities, and a timeline layer. Start with the Tauri commands and workspace layout if you need a high-confidence onboarding path.

Architecture graph

Signals

5,000+ files indexed
Hybrid search + citations
Secret Shield before cloud calls
Why Atlas

Product storytelling built around the actual system: local indexing, real repo awareness, and controlled agentic power.

The page now moves directly from Atlas's core system strengths into a richer product gallery, so the visual preview lands harder and earlier.

Private by design

Index locally. Reason with structure. Keep the source of truth on your machine.

Atlas combines a Rust-native indexing pipeline with local LLM workflows so repositories stay searchable, explainable, and private.

  • Hybrid semantic + keyword retrieval
  • Tree-Sitter powered GraphRAG context
  • Local LanceDB storage with transparent citations
Built for real workflows

Move from raw chat to focused modes for architecture, review, writing, and security.

Atlas ships with specialized personas that change the system prompt, the lens, and the tone so answers stay useful instead of generic.

  • Architect for system trade-offs
  • Security Auditor for secret and risk scans
  • Writer for clean handoff docs
Time-aware context

Ask what changed yesterday, trace architectural drift, and review the repo with temporal context.

Timeline intelligence and Git awareness turn Atlas into more than a file searcher. It can summarize motion through the codebase, not just snapshots.

  • Recent-change summarization
  • Git branch and diff context
  • Pinned files for exact prompt control
Agentic without chaos

Bounded tooling keeps the product powerful enough to verify work while staying grounded.

Atlas can search, inspect, propose diffs, and execute scoped commands, giving teams a local-first assistant that feels like a disciplined teammate.

  • Local shell and file tools
  • Proposed diffs with citations
  • Optional cloud fallback with secret shielding
Screenshots

The product preview now lives here: a tighter gallery with sharper framing, stronger captions, and clearer signals from the real desktop app.

Instead of inserting a separate simulated demo block, Atlas moves straight from capability into product surfaces. That keeps the pacing cleaner and makes each still work harder.

Downloads and specs

Versioned builds, normalized release metadata, and direct links that map cleanly to each platform.

Atlas pulls its release data from GitHub on the server, caches it for five minutes, and turns installer assets into a stable interface for the marketing site.
